locker.waitlistJoinedOn: You joined the locker waitlist on {{date}}.
locker.lockerAvailable: A locker is available — contact the club office to confirm your assignment.
locker.willBeNotified: You will be notified when a locker becomes available.

notifLabels.pushDesc: Receive real-time alerts on your device

notifLabels.noPhone: No phone number on file — contact your club admin
notifLabels.memberDocumentsDesc: Get notified when a member uploads a document for review

languageModal.title: Language Preference
languageModal.description: Choose your preferred display language. Arabic includes right-to-left layout support.

scoringHistory.noHistoryDesc: Register for a tournament and post scores to see your history here

withdraw.title: Withdraw from Tournament
withdraw.successWithRefund: You have been withdrawn from the tournament. A refund request has been raised and will be processed by the organizer.
withdraw.success: You have been successfully withdrawn from the tournament.
withdraw.message: Are you sure you want to withdraw from "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone. If you paid an entry fee, your refund will be processed by the organizer.

errors.photoUploadFailed: Failed to upload profile photo. Please try again.
errors.avatarSelectFailed: Failed to select avatar. Please try again.
errors.avatarPickerDesc: Pick a golf-themed avatar — no upload required.
errors.permissionLibrary: Allow access to your photo library in Settings.

caddiePending.title: Pending recommendations
caddiePending.subtitle: Review each AI Caddie pick and mark which club you actually hit.
caddiePending.errorAiOff: AI Caddie is turned off for your account. Re-enable AI consent in Privacy to use this screen.
caddiePending.errorLoad: Could not load your pending recommendations.
caddiePending.emptyText: No recommendations are waiting for your feedback.
caddiePending.saveErrorDefault: Please try again in a moment.
caddiePending.saveErrorNetwork: Please check your connection and try again.
caddiePending.invalidDistanceMsg: Distance to the pin should be a number between 0 and 400 yards. Tap Skip to save without it.
caddiePending.outcomeHint: Optional — distance to the pin after your shot, in yards. Helps the AI Caddie learn faster.
caddiePending.noRecommendation: The AI didn't have enough data to recommend a club.

badges.shareMessageUnlocked: I just unlocked the “{{label}}” {{icon}} badge on KHARAGOLF! {{url}}
badges.shareMessageLocked: I'm closing in on the “{{label}}” {{icon}} badge on KHARAGOLF {{url}}
badges.shareMessageLockedProgress: I'm closing in on the “{{label}}” {{icon}} badge on KHARAGOLF — {{current}} of {{target}}! {{url}}
badges.title: Badges
badges.signInToView: Sign in to view your badges.
badges.shareFailedMessage: Could not open the share sheet.

commPrefs.intro: Choose how your club may contact you for each topic. You can opt out of marketing entirely while still receiving service updates.
commPrefs.whatsappFootnote: WhatsApp messages are sent from the club's verified WhatsApp Business number — standard MSG91 carrier rules apply.

operations.label: Operations
operations.description: Course closures, weather and operational alerts.

privacy.label: Privacy & legal
privacy.description: Mandatory data-protection notices (e.g. privacy requests). In-app and email are always on; choose whether to also receive push and SMS.

emailOptOuts.sectionDescription: Fine-tune individual transactional emails without silencing the whole billing category.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLabel: Email me when a data export is about to expire
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringDesc: Reminder email a few days before a data export download link stops working.
emailOptOuts.dataExportExpiringLinkChangeHint: Last changed via email link on {{date}} ({{direction}})
emailOptOuts.sideGameReceiptsDesc: Email receipts when another player settles a casual side-game wager with you.
emailOptOuts.manualEntryDesc: Push and email when a tournament round closes that was mostly hand-entered. Only seen by tournament directors and committee members.
emailOptOuts.coachPayoutDesc: Email when a coach's payout account is created or updated, sent to org admins as a security signal.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyDesc: Email when an organisation admin manually re-verifies your payout account. Independent of the broader Billing opt-out below — turning this off only silences the admin courtesy notice and leaves payout receipts and the cron-side needs-attention email intact.
emailOptOuts.adminPayoutReverifyTipBody: Coaches: this admin courtesy email is now its own switch. Mute just these notices without silencing the rest of your Billing emails.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestDesc: Daily controller email listing members whose account erasure left object-storage files behind.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageDigestPushDesc: Daily controller in-app pings and push notifications listing members whose account erasure left object-storage files behind. Independent of the email toggle above — silence either channel without affecting the other.
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageStatusBothMuted: Both muted — alerts will only show in the audit log
emailOptOuts.erasureStorageBothMutedHint: Heads up: the org-level escalation still relies on at least one channel reaching you. With both muted, new stuck-erasure alerts will only show up if you happen to open the audit log.

notificationAudit.heading: Suppressed notifications
notificationAudit.intro: When a notification is silenced before it reaches you — because you muted the alert, or because the system couldn't deliver it (e.g. a bounced email or no registered device) — we record it here so a real outage can't hide forever, even if you've muted every channel.
notificationAudit.emptySubtitle: We didn't record any notifications that the system or your settings silenced for you in the last {{days}} days.
notificationAudit.errorSignedOut: Sign in to view your suppressed notifications.
notificationAudit.errorLoadFailed: Couldn't load your notification audit. Try again.

keyPrefs.sectionDescription: Pick how each batchable notification reaches you. Real-time sends right away; Daily summary holds it until the next digest email.
keyPrefs.digestModePrefix: Your global digest setting is currently
keyPrefs.digestModeSuffix: . Choices below override it for individual notifications.

notificationKeys.booking.waitlist.promoted: Waitlist auto-promoted you to a confirmed booking
notificationKeys.caddie.mode.blocked: An AI Caddie request was blocked by round mode
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.changed.admin: A coach's payout account was created or updated (admin oversight alert)
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.changed.coach: Your coach payout account was created or updated (security alert)
notificationKeys.coach.payout.account.needs_attention: Coach payout account failed periodic re-verification
notificationKeys.coach.review.delivered: Your coach delivered an async swing review
notificationKeys.coaching.gap.closed: You closed a coaching gap on a club (proximity-vs-tour trend improved)
notificationKeys.course.correction.resolved: Your reported course correction was resolved
notificationKeys.handicap.committee.changed: The committee changed your handicap index
notificationKeys.handicap.exceptional.score: Exceptional score handicap reduction was triggered
notificationKeys.interclub.qualified: You qualified for the interclub final
notificationKeys.leaderboard.position.change: You moved up or down the leaderboard
notificationKeys.levy.ledger.digest.failed: Per-levy ledger CSV digest failed to deliver or was paused due to bouncing recipients
notificationKeys.levy.ledger.org.digest.failed: Club-wide combined levy ledger CSV digest failed to deliver or was paused due to bouncing recipients
notificationKeys.levy.reminders.digest.failed: Bounced-levy reminders digest failed to deliver to every admin recipient
notificationKeys.marshal.pace.alert: A group is behind the pace threshold
notificationKeys.moderation.assigned: A moderation item was assigned to you
notificationKeys.near.miss: You narrowly missed earning a badge
notificationKeys.notify.exhaustion.admin_digest.failed: The daily exhaustion admin digest failed to deliver to every admin recipient for an org
notificationKeys.payment.received: A payment was received and applied
notificationKeys.privacy.erasure.storage_failures.control: Controller daily digest: members' account erasure left files behind in object storage
notificationKeys.scheduled.email.failed: An admin-scheduled email failed to send
notificationKeys.side_game.receipt.digest.failed: Stuck side-game receipts digest failed to deliver or was paused due to bouncing recipients
notificationKeys.social.mention: You were mentioned in a feed post
notificationKeys.sponsor.asset.review: A sponsor uploaded an asset awaiting review
notificationKeys.tournament.cut.applied: Cut line applied; round 3 grouping published
notificationKeys.tournament.override.applied: A club admin bulk-applied a notification default that overrode this tournament's setting
notificationKeys.verified.handicap.expiring: Your verified-handicap badge is expiring soon
notificationKeys.volunteer.assignment.assigned: A volunteer was assigned to a tournament role
notificationKeys.wallet.payout.account.needs_attention: Your wallet payout account failed periodic re-verification
notificationKeys.wallet.refund.digest.failed: Wallet auto-refund digest failed to deliver or was paused due to bouncing recipients

walletPayoutNeedsReverify.titleUpi: Re-save your UPI to resume withdrawals
walletPayoutNeedsReverify.titleBank: Re-save your bank account to resume withdrawals
walletPayoutNeedsReverify.body: Our latest scheduled re-check of your saved payout details didn't go through, so withdrawals are paused until you re-save them.
